'''ây-z-f-p''' ('''kayazfepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monomethylate|monomethylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monomethylate|monomethylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-z-f-p
|-
! Lemma
| kayazfepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyazfepoko|thiyazfepoko]] || [[word:jiyazfepoko|jiyazfepoko]] || [[word:shiyazfepoko|shiyazfepoko]] || [[word:kiyazfepoko|kiyazfepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyazfepoko|thuthuyazfepoko]] || [[word:jujuyazfepoko|jujuyazfepoko]] || [[word:shushuyazfepoko|shushuyazfepoko]] || [[word:kukuyazfepoko|kukuyazfepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyazfepoko|thoyazfepoko]] || [[word:joyazfepoko|joyazfepoko]] || [[word:shoyazfepoko|shoyazfepoko]] || [[word:koyazfepoko|koyazfepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
